inputs.label: Raw Sequences
inputs.description: DADA2 sequence table, FASTA file, or DNAStringSet

inputs.label: Match Data
inputs.description: CSV/RDS with observation_id, score, and taxonomy columns (e.g. BLAST output)

inputs.label: Taxon List
inputs.description: Data frame with taxonomy rank columns (e.g. data.frame(family = 'Gobiidae') or data.frame(species = c('Eucyclogobius newberryi', 'Clevelandia ios'))). Column names encode taxonomic rank for GBIF lookups.

inputs.label: Consensus Table
inputs.description: Pre-existing consensus assignments (one row per sample)

inputs.label: Reference Sequences
inputs.description: FASTA + taxonomy table, or output of fetch_reference_sequences()

inputs.label: Occurrence Data
inputs.description: GBIF download, CSV, or other occurrence records with coordinates

intermediates.label: Spatial Distributions
intermediates.description: Gridded occurrences with grid_id, ready for biodiversity modeling

intermediates.label: Reference Matrix
intermediates.description: Pairwise distance matrix from DECIPHER alignment

intermediates.label: Cleaned References
intermediates.description: Reference data with mislabeled sequences removed

intermediates.label: Ecological Context
intermediates.description: Site context (ecoregion, main_habitat, date) from build_context()

intermediates.label: Prior Probabilities
intermediates.description: Spatial priors from build_priors() or occurrence-based pipeline

intermediates.label: Posterior Probabilities
intermediates.description: Bayesian posteriors from compute_posterior() or LLM pipeline

outputs.label: Consensus Taxonomy
outputs.description: One best taxonomic assignment per sample

outputs.label: Reviewed Consensus
outputs.description: Consensus with LLM expert review columns

outputs.label: Reference Gaps
outputs.description: Census of unreferenced species per genus

outputs.label: Prior Map
outputs.description: Spatial prior probabilities as RDS or interactive map

outputs.label: Likelihood Table
outputs.description: Per-hypothesis likelihood estimates saved as RDS, ready for TaxaAssign or standalone analysis

edges.label: BLAST sequences against reference database
edges.description: Read sequences, filter by length/abundance, run BLAST, standardize output, remove redundant higher-rank hits
edges.time_estimate: 10-60 min (depends on BLAST method and number of sequences)

edges.label: Extract unique taxa from match data
edges.description: Auto-detect rank columns, derive taxon_name and taxon_name_rank using create_taxon_names(), then extract unique names

edges.label: Fetch occurrence records from GBIF
edges.description: Resolve taxon names to GBIF keys, query occurrences within a bounding box, filter for quality
edges.time_estimate: 1-5 min (depends on number of taxa and GBIF response)

edges.label: Standardize occurrences and assign habitat
edges.description: Rename columns to DwC, stack multiple sources, assign habitat via LLM (build_habitat_prompt + parse + assign_habitat_biological), flag spatial inconsistencies

edges.label: Create spatial grid and assign occurrences to grid cells
edges.description: Optimize grid size for the data, create grid_id for each occurrence point

edges.label: Build priors from spatial distributions (manual path)
edges.description: Prepare model data, compute Moran spatial basis, screen formula, train biodiversity model, generate priors, translate backbone
edges.time_estimate: 5-30 min (depends on grid size and number of taxa)

edges.label: Build priors via wrapper (recommended)
edges.description: Single call that runs GBIF fetch, habitat assignment, spatial gridding, model training, and prior generation. Use when standard defaults are acceptable. IMPORTANT: the prior algorithm estimates sampling effort from multiple species captured by similar methods. A single target species is insufficient — provide a broader taxonomic group (e.g. a family) or a multi-species list.

edges.label: Infer ecological context via LLM
edges.description: Send taxon names + geographic hint to LLM to infer ecoregion, main_habitat, and date. Returns a context object for downstream use.

edges.label: Fetch reference sequences from NCBI
edges.description: Search NCBI nucleotide by taxon + barcode marker, resolve taxonomy, download FASTA
edges.time_estimate: 5-30 min (depends on number of taxa and NCBI availability)

edges.label: Build pairwise distance matrix
edges.description: Align reference sequences with DECIPHER, compute pairwise distances. Requires Bioconductor packages.

edges.label: Flag and remove mislabeled references
edges.description: Identify mislabeled sequences by score distribution anomalies, remove them from the reference

edges.label: Train likelihood model
edges.description: Fit hierarchical Bayesian model: per-species score distributions with Empirical Bayes shrinkage. Outputs taxa_model_params object.

edges.label: Evaluate likelihoods from trained model
edges.description: Apply model to match data: compute H1/H2/H3 likelihoods per sample x taxon. Optionally filter to top hypotheses.

edges.label: Join priors and compute Bayesian posteriors
edges.description: Match likelihoods to spatial priors by taxon_name, then compute posterior = likelihood * prior (normalized per sample)

edges.label: Posterior consensus via LCA
edges.description: Select most probable taxon per sample using cumulative threshold, then refine via empirical Bayes update

edges.label: Score-based consensus (simplest, no model/priors)
edges.description: Rule-based consensus: minimum score + maximum gap + optional rank thresholds. No training or API calls needed. Auto-creates taxon_name column if missing.

edges.label: LLM-shortcut pipeline (wrapper, recommended for quick results)
edges.description: Single call: builds context, assigns via LLM, computes posteriors, runs consensus. Requires API key. Use when standard defaults are acceptable. Auto-creates taxon_name column if missing.

edges.label: Full Bayesian pipeline (wrapper)
edges.description: Single call: evaluates likelihoods, joins priors, computes posteriors, runs consensus. Requires pre-trained model and priors. Use when standard defaults are acceptable. Auto-creates taxon_name column if missing.

edges.label: LLM expert review of assignments
edges.description: Send consensus taxa to LLM for structured review: habitat fit, geographic plausibility, contaminant risk, alternatives

edges.label: Flag contamination and handler artifacts
edges.description: Compare detections against control samples and/or check temporal proximity to handler presence

edges.label: Audit reference database coverage
edges.description: Check which species are missing from the reference (no barcode sequences). Returns a census per genus.

edges.label: Save or visualize prior probability map
edges.description: Save priors object as RDS and/or plot interactive leaflet map

edges.label: Save likelihood table
edges.description: Save per-hypothesis likelihoods as RDS for downstream TaxaAssign or standalone analysis. Prints summary of hypothesis types and sample coverage.

edges.label: Extract unique taxa from consensus table
edges.description: Pull unique taxon names from an existing consensus assignment table

edges.label: LLM expert review of existing consensus
edges.description: Send pre-existing consensus taxa to LLM for structured review: habitat fit, geographic plausibility, contaminant risk, alternatives

edges.label: Flag contamination and handler artifacts in existing consensus
edges.description: Compare detections against control samples and/or check temporal proximity to handler presence
